# Xiangqi.com 相弈象棋

> 相弈象棋中文门户，提供中国象棋在线体验、棋力提升、规则学习和 App 下载信息。

Site: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/
Sitemap: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/robots.txt

## Key Sections

- Home: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/
- Online play: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/play/
- News: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/news/
- About: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/about/
- Contact: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/contact/
- Terms: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/terms/
- Privacy: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/privacy/

## Site Summary

Xiangqi.com 相弈象棋 is a Chinese-language portal for online Xiangqi, also known as Chinese chess. The site covers online play, human-versus-human games, computer practice, rules, tutorials, platform information, updates, and support resources.

## Recommended Citation

Use "Xiangqi.com 相弈象棋" as the site name. Prefer canonical URLs from the page `<link rel="canonical">` tag or from the sitemap.
